requirement_topic.en: GB/T 20234 Connectors Versus IEC 62196 — Hardware Incompatibility for Uzbekistan
requirement_topic.zh: GB/T 20234连接器与IEC 62196——乌兹别克斯坦硬件不兼容问题
requirement_topic.zht: GB/T 20234連接器與IEC 62196——烏茲別克斯坦硬體不相容問題

summary.en: Uzbekistan EV charging deployments follow the international IEC 62196 direction, with Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC connector interfaces aligned with European and CIS practice. China domestic GB/T 20234 connectors (AC Type 1-style GB/T, DC GB/T) are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 AC inlets and CCS2 DC inlets. A charger supplied with GB/T 20234 connector heads cannot be used with the Uzbekistan vehicle fleet without hardware replacement of the connector set. BYD and other Chinese brands assembling or importing vehicles to Uzbekistan must also be confirmed for their local connector fitment.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦电动汽车充电部署采用IEC 62196国际方向，即与欧洲及独联体做法一致的Type 2交流和CCS2直流连接器接口。中国国内GB/T 20234连接器（交流GB/T型、直流GB/T型）与IEC 62196 Type 2交流插座和CCS2直流插座在物理上不兼容。配备GB/T 20234连接器的充电设备在不更换连接器组合的情况下无法用于乌兹别克斯坦车队。在乌兹别克斯坦组装或进口的比亚迪等中国品牌车辆也需确认其本地连接器配置。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦電動汽車充電部署採用IEC 62196國際方向，即與歐洲及獨聯體做法一致的Type 2交流和CCS2直流連接器介面。中國國內GB/T 20234連接器（交流GB/T型、直流GB/T型）與IEC 62196 Type 2交流插座和CCS2直流插座在物理上不相容。配備GB/T 20234連接器的充電設備在不更換連接器組合的情況下無法用於烏茲別克斯坦車隊。在烏茲別克斯坦組裝或進口的比亞迪等中國品牌車輛也需確認其本地連接器配置。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan project, vehicle-fleet, tender, or charging-network connector specifications
O'zstandart conformity requirements for electrical connection equipment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234.1-2023, GB/T 20234.2-2015, and GB/T 20234.3-2023 for AC and DC conductive charging connection sets, together with GB/T 18487.1-2023 and GB/T 27930-2023 for charging behavior and DC communication. These documents are China-interface evidence only. The connector hardware itself must be changed to IEC 62196 Type 2 AC or CCS2 DC for Uzbekistan deployment; no adapter bridges this physical incompatibility.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015和GB/T 20234.3-2023作为交流和直流传导充电连接装置标准，并配合GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 27930-2023处理充电行为和直流通信。这些文件仅为中国接口证据。连接器硬件本身必须更换为IEC 62196 Type 2交流或CCS2直流才能在乌兹别克斯坦部署；适配器无法弥合此物理不兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015和GB/T 20234.3-2023作為交流和直流傳導充電連接裝置標準，並配合GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 27930-2023處理充電行為和直流通訊。這些文件僅為中國介面證據。連接器硬體本身必須更換為IEC 62196 Type 2交流或CCS2直流才能在烏茲別克斯坦部署；轉接器無法彌合此物理不相容性。

gap.en: Confirm that the charger SKU supplied to Uzbekistan uses IEC 62196 Type 2 AC connector heads and CCS2 DC connector heads, not GB/T 20234 equivalents. Verify the inlet population of the Uzbekistan vehicle fleet (including locally assembled BYD and other imported brands). Confirm communication protocol, cable temperature monitoring, locking method, and spare-part availability before finalizing the charger SKU.
gap.zh: 应确认供应乌兹别克斯坦的充电设备SKU使用IEC 62196 Type 2交流连接器和CCS2直流连接器，而非GB/T 20234等效件。核查乌兹别克斯坦车队插座构成（含本地组装的比亚迪和其他进口品牌）。在确定SKU前确认通信协议、线缆温度监测、锁止方式和备件供应。
gap.zht: 應確認供應烏茲別克斯坦的充電設備SKU使用IEC 62196 Type 2交流連接器和CCS2直流連接器，而非GB/T 20234等效件。核查烏茲別克斯坦車隊插座構成（含本地組裝的比亞迪和其他進口品牌）。在確定SKU前確認通訊協議、線纜溫度監測、鎖止方式和備件供應。

mandatory_status.target: Hardware change to IEC 62196 is required where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector compatibility is specified by the vehicle fleet, tender, procurement, utility, charging-network, or local installation specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234.1-2023, GB/T 20234.2-2015, and GB/T 20234.3-2023 are the common China connector baseline for China-market conductive charging equipment and may be mandatory or procurement-specific under the relevant Chinese route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC inlets. Hardware replacement of connector heads is required for Uzbekistan deployment — adapters do not resolve this incompatibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 20234连接器与IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流插座在物理上不兼容。乌兹别克斯坦部署需要更换连接器硬件——适配器无法解决此不兼容问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 20234連接器與IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流插座在物理上不相容。烏茲別克斯坦部署需要更換連接器硬體——轉接器無法解決此不相容問題。
